TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Rgyax ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Tayto go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 74 buwan, 246 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 235 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 11 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 87%, Amis 2%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%.
S.PHON: alaŇč r…£jax …£a nija mki s~…ēku …£iraŇč keŇč atu tajto …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, amis~…ē *%, s~…ēetik *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%.
S.FORM: alang Rgyax ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Tayto go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 74 buwan, 246 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 235 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 11 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 87%, Amis 2%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%.
